resources.string: Accept images from everyone without confirmation.
Please press \"Continue\" if you choose to start using our app.
Enable the Creative Debugger SDK settings in order to view recent ads.
Displays more info about the list item.
Track Axon events and see them here by using AppLovinEventService.trackEvent(...).
To use %s you must agree to our Terms & Conditions and affirm you have reviewed our Privacy Policy
To use %s you must affirm that you have reviewed and acknowledged our Privacy Policy.
You\'re banned because you have violated our terms of service.
You\'re temporarily banned because you have violated our terms of service. You\'ll be able to use RandoChat again in:\n%1$s

Your profile has been disabled until the ban period ends. Your photos and nickname have also been removed, returning to Anonymous. If you don\'t use the app in 180 days, your account will be deleted permanently. Contact us at randochat.app@gmail.com
If your account has been banned in error, please contact randochat.app@gmail.com with the id below.
There is a person on the other side.
Before you start the conversation, check out these tips…
You will not receive messages from that person while the block is active.
Emulators are not allowed. Please use a mobile phone.
You haven’t blocked anyone yet. Profiles that you block will appear here so you can manage them later.
Profile image editing is temporarily locked due to a policy violation. You can try again at:\n%1$s
All messages in this chat will be deleted.
Visit facebook.com/device and enter the code shown above.
To connect your account, open the Facebook app on your mobile device and check for notifications.
You\'re in control - choose what info you want to share with apps.
%1$s won\'t work unless you enable Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device.
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device.
%1$s won\'t run unless you update Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are currently updating.
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
We take child protection seriously. Please read our detailed policy on child sexual abuse and exploitation to understand the measures we take and how you can report concerns.

If you delete your account, you will permanently lose your profile, messages, photos, and friends. Your account and all data will be deleted within 30 days. Your account will be deactivated during this period, and no one will be able to find you. If you log in again during this period, the deletion will be automatically canceled.
Are you sure you want to delete this?
This chat and all messages will be deleted.
Are you sure you want to delete this?

We do not allow images, texts, or any content that contains or promotes sexually explicit material, including pornography. Furthermore, our services must not be used for any content or activity intended for sexual gratification. Violation of this policy will result in account blocking or termination.
Depictions of sex acts or sexually suggestive poses are prohibited.
Promotional images of sex toys are not allowed.
Promoting sexually explicit content is prohibited.
Content that depicts, describes, or encourages bestiality is prohibited.
Promote escort services or other services that could be interpreted as offering sexual acts in exchange for compensation.
Users are prohibited from using offensive or inappropriate nicknames.
Sharing personal phone numbers or social media accounts on our platform is prohibited.
Selling any type of content or requiring money from other users through our platform is strictly forbidden.
Our apps strictly forbid any activities that could harm children.
Here are some examples of common violations:
While turned off, you will not be discoverable. However, you can still see and chat with your friends.
Make sure “Show me in discovery” is on so other users can find you.
* Don\'t worry, you will remain anonymous.
Download complete! Check the Downloads folder on your device.
Download a copy of all the data we have associated with your account.
This image is already in use. Please choose another one to continue.
Activate or update your consent for data processing according to the European Union privacy regulations. Essential for users in the EU.
Add a profile photo to use this filter.
This device does not have a fingerprint sensor
Too many attempts. Please try again later.
You\'ll be able to edit again in %1$d hours.
You\'ll be able to edit again in %1$d days.
You\'ll be able to edit again in less than one hour.
* You can change it again after 30 days.
Failed to send profile image. Please try again.
Swipe to select a year, or tap to switch back to selecting a day
Switch to clock mode for the time input
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
You need to receive more messages in this conversation to use this feature.
Photos submitted to the app will be reviewed by our team before publication.
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s
If you turn off read receipts, you won\'t able to see read receipts from other people.
Voice Messages are always automatically downloaded for the best communication experience.
You\'ll be able to edit again in %1$d hours.
You\'ll be able to edit again in %1$d days.
You\'ll be able to edit again in less than one hour.
* You can change it again after 72 hours.
We couldn’t find anyone matching your filters right now. Adjust them or try again soon.
You\'re temporarily blocked from editing your profile image. You\'ll be able to edit again in:\n%1$s
To keep you updated on the latest news and alerts, we need permission to send notifications. Please enable permission in the app settings.
Enable notification display for new messages.
Allow app to send you notifications?
Thanks for your interest.\nWe will share more once you\'re back online.
You are back online! Let\'s pick up where we left off
You are back online! Continue learning about %s
We\'ll send you a notification with a link to the advertiser site.
Open ad when you\'re back online.
Some images are awaiting review by our moderators. View images
We need permission to read/write audio files from external storage
We need permission to read images from external storage.
To keep using Randochat, install the latest version from the Play Store.
To avoid spam, please refrain from copying and pasting the same message to multiple people.
If you don\'t share your Last Seen, you won\'t be able to see other people\'s Last Seen.
Review the detailed terms and conditions to better understand your rights and responsibilities as a user of our service.
This profile has already been reported. Thank you for your cooperation.
Optional, but it helps people get to know you.
Add interests so people know your vibe
Please fill out all required fields in the form to proceed.
If you enjoy playing this app, would you mind taking a moment to rate it? It won\'t take more than a minute. Thanks for your support!
This app may not work correctly without the requested permissions.
This app may not work correctly without the requested permissions. Open the app settings screen to modify app permissions.
Access blocked because Google age verification indicates that parental approval was denied for this account.
Google Play Age Signals is not available on this device right now. Update the Google Play Store, install the app from the Google Play Store, and try again.
This app was not installed by Google Play. Install the app from the Google Play Store to continue.
We could not connect to the Google Play Store service to validate your age. Update the Google Play Store and try again in a moment.
There was an internal error while validating your age. Please try again later.
No network connection was found to validate your age. Check your internet connection and try again.
Google Play Services is unavailable on this device. Install, enable, or update Google Play Services and try again.
Google Play Services needs to be updated before we can validate your age.
Google Play Store was not found on this device. Install or enable the Google Play Store and try again.
The Google Play Store app needs to be updated before we can validate your age. After updating it, install the app from the Google Play Store and try again.
This app version is no longer supported for Google age validation. Update the app and try again.
There was a temporary issue on this device while validating your age. Please try again later.
Access blocked because Google age verification indicates that parental approval is still pending for this account.
We could not determine your age from Google Play for your region. Access has been blocked. Please open the Google Play Store and resolve your age status before trying again.
We could not validate your age with Google right now. Access has been blocked until age verification can be completed.
I confirm that I\'m 18 years old or over.
I accept the Privacy Policy & Terms of Use.
* This feature is available exclusively for system testers.
Our app does not support emulators, chromebooks, devices with modified system software, or custom ROMs.
Oops! It seems there was a connection issue with our servers. Please check your internet connection and try again. If the problem persists, please try again later.
To use the app, you need a mobile phone with Google Play Services installed.
I understand that sharing inappropriate content will not be tolerated.
There was an error connecting to the internet. Please check your internet connection.
Chat anonymously and meet new friends.
Chat with just a single tap.
You must be over 18 to access this app. If you are under 18, you must uninstall this application.

Oops! We\'ve encountered a problem verifying your device.

This may happen because:
The Google Play Services or Google Play Store are missing, outdated, or not working properly. Your device isn\'t signed into a valid Google account. There\'s a temporary issue with Google\'s servers.

What you can do:
Ensure the Google Play Store and Google Play Services are installed and updated. Sign into your device with a valid Google account. Restart your device and try again. If the issue persists, verify that the app was downloaded from the Google Play Store.

Our app does not support emulators, devices with modified system software, or custom ROMs.
We don\'t post anything to Facebook or Google.
By checking this box, I confirm that my report is truthful and I consent to having the last messages in this conversation uploaded and reviewed by a moderator.
There is no profile image to report.
There are no messages to report.
Inappropriate Chat Content - Messages, images, or audio files shared in chat that contain offensive, explicit, or otherwise inappropriate material, violating community guidelines.
Inappropriate Profile Photos - Profile pictures that include nudity, explicit content, offensive material, or impersonation of others.
Pedophilia - Behavior suggesting sexual attraction to minors. This includes suspicious or suggestive interactions without direct evidence of abuse.
Spam or Unwanted Content - Repetitive, unsolicited, or irrelevant messages that disrupt the user experience.
Other Violations - Issues that do not fall into the listed categories but still violate community standards or platform policies.
Underage User" - Reports of users suspected to be under 18 years old, violating the platform\'s age restrictions."
Inappropriate Profile Description - Profile descriptions that contain offensive language, misleading information, or violate platform rules.
Child Sexual Abuse and Exploitation (CSAE) - Any actions involving the abuse, exploitation, or harm of minors, including the sharing of exploitative content, coercion, or trafficking.
Is something bothering you? Please select a reason for your report and help us understand the issue:
Allow Ad to store image in Picture gallery?
Allow Ad to create a calendar event?
This function is temporarily blocked because you have violated our terms of service. You\'ll be able to search again in:
Your app experience will remain uninterrupted.
Subscribe for %1$s per year. You are not eligible for a trial period. Your subscription will renew automatically unless canceled.
Enjoy a free 7-day trial. After the trial ends, you will be charged %1$s per year unless canceled before the trial period ends.

* You can cancel anytime in Subscriptions on Google Play before the trial ends to avoid charges. Your subscription renews automatically unless canceled. After the charge, there will be no refunds for the paid period.

* You can cancel anytime in Subscriptions on Google Play before the renewal to avoid future charges. Your subscription will renew automatically unless canceled. After the charge, there will be no refunds for the paid period.
Conversations older than %s days that have not received any new messages will be automatically deleted. However, favorite conversations will be retained and not deleted.
Both input and output Uri must be specified
Therefore, override color resource (ucrop_color_toolbar_widget) in your app to make it work on pre-L devices
By unblocking, you\'ll be able to send and receive messages from this user again.
This function is temporarily blocked because you have violated our terms of service. You\'ll be able to upload again in:
